0.text: Bronchiectasis in both lungs, particularly in the lower lobes

1.text: Sequelae changes with coarse calcifications in the superior segment of the left lower lobe

2.text: Sequelae changes with coarse calcifications in the anterior segment of the left upper lobe

3.text: Fibrotic densities in the upper lobes of both lungs

4.text: Nonspecific calcific sequelae pulmonary nodules in both lungs
